name: free qty si
script:
"""
Hooked to 'before_save' and 'before_submit'.
Forces ERPNext to deduct both standard and free quantities from warehouse stock.
"""
for item in doc.items:
    # Check if our custom free_qty field has a value
    free_qty = frappe.utils.flt(item.get("custom_free_qty"))
    billed_qty = frappe.utils.flt(item.qty)
    
    if free_qty > 0:
        total_physical_qty = billed_qty + free_qty
        conversion_factor = frappe.utils.flt(item.conversion_factor) or 1.0
        
        # 'stock_qty' is the hidden field ERPNext uses to post to the Stock Ledger (Serial / Batch Bundle)
        item.stock_qty = total_physical_qty * conversion_factor

name: Add free qty in SI
script:
"""

for item in doc.items:

    if free_qty > 0:

        conversion_factor = frappe.utils.flt(item.conversion_factor) or 1.0
        
        # 'stock_qty' is the hidden field ERPNext uses to post to the Stock Ledger (Serial / Batch Bundle)
        item.stock_qty = total_physical_qty * conversion_factor
